memory.what_this_project_is: Veil Cartography is the umbrella brand for Gnostic / esoteric content, hidden-knowledge mapping, and related media. It includes social channels and may include a web app or oracle-style tool.
named_assets: Veil Cartography — umbrella brand and social identity
Gnostic Oracle — current web app concept (possible rename: Field Cartography Oracle)
Social platforms: YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook
purpose: Build a Gnostic library / content system
Turn esoteric research into structured, publishable material
Connect content work to AI-assisted research and database workflows
decisions_needed: Keep Gnostic Oracle or rename to Field Cartography Oracle?
Is the oracle a content product, research tool, lead magnet, or public web app?
Which database holds: source texts, symbols/concepts, content ideas, published posts, scripts/essays?
memory.next_action: Decide naming → define content categories → connect to content database
